title: Account NDF Healthcheck Playbook
description: Build account-level NDF healthchecks for large customers: data pack, careful pushback when they part-swap, and proactive monthly reports via sales.

mindset.principle: VIP silence is expensive. Their own return data is the adult conversation, not a blame slide.

mistakes.label: Always ship parts for important accounts with no pattern review
mistakes.cost: Problem shifts (HW vs SW vs vendor); nobody fixed

mistakes.label: Surprise the customer with NDF shaming
Keep NDF internal; sales never carries health story

decision_branches.situation: Important account high volume, high NDF, low real fix rate
Large accounts get no proactive return health story
Support has data; sales owns relationship
Customer IT insists diagnosis is always hardware

agent_signal.use_when: Large or VIP account burns parts with high NDF. Need pushback with their data. Want monthly healthcheck sales can carry.
decision_criteria: Sales aligned before customer sees the pack.
Actions are joint (their process + your support rules).
agent_signal.operator_context: Field pattern: enterprise part-swap theater ends when account NDF is shared calmly and repeatedly.
agent_signal.not_for: Generic job spine comms. Not a substitute for mf-tpl-060 return log basics. Not legal advice.
trigger_phrases: Large or VIP account burns parts with high NDF. Need pushback with their data. W
Need playbook: Account NDF Healthcheck Playbook
